message:
fix: Correct merge delta ID propagation and clean up llm.ts

1. Fix merge delta ID bug in orchestrator.ts:
   - Pre-generated newBulletId was not included in add delta's bullet
   - This caused deprecate deltas to reference non-existent IDs
   - Now the id is passed in the bullet data

2. Fix playbook.ts addBullet to respect pre-supplied IDs:
   - Changed from `id: generateBulletId()` to `id: data.id || generateBulletId()`
   - Enables merge operations to use consistent IDs

3. Remove pointless try-catch in llm.ts getModel():
   - The try-catch that just rethrows serves no purpose

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -222,6 +222,7 @@ export async function orchestrateReflection(
           processedDeltas.push({
             type: "add",
             bullet: {
+              id: newBulletId,  // Pre-assign ID so deprecate deltas can reference it
               content: delta.mergedContent,
               category: "merged", // Default category, curation might refine or we could infer
               tags: []

@@ -437,7 +437,7 @@ export function addBullet(
   const agent = extractAgentFromPath(sourceSession); 
 
   const newBullet: PlaybookBullet = {
-    id: generateBulletId(),
+    id: data.id || generateBulletId(),
     content: data.content,
     category: data.category,
     kind: data.kind || "workflow_rule",
